entry.title: Re: Joule – Getting Started with Document Grounding - setup guide

Thanks for the information,

The document grounding is just for success factors solution? or you could use in other solutions as IBP or SAP S/4 HANA cloud?

entry.title: Re: Email notification for Flexible workflow – Purchase Order

Hi Saurabh,

can we send email to requisitioner instead of PO creator when workflow is completed.

Regards

MD

entry.title: Re: Bring SAP SuccessFactors Data into SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
Hi Lalit,

Great blog post series, thanks a lot!

Do you know, if there is a way to restrict the data read from Success Factors directly at API level, that means before the data is replicated into Datasphere? 

The reason I am asking this is that a customer wants to limit the number of fields of each table (projection) and the number of rows (filter) to make sure that no personally identifying information (PII) is ever available on SAP Datasphere.

Any thoughts on this?

Best regards,

Matthias

entry.title: Is there a way to enable ILX on the mobile app?
entry.content: We are going to enable the ILX as the default for our full LMS population with 1H2025. Is there a way to push this change on the mobile app without asking users to adjust their settings?

entry.title: Hiring manager recieving multiple emails_onboarding 2.0
entry.content: All of the new hire tasks assigned to hiring manager due to which multiple notifications are trigger to hiring manager like 1 per task, how to restrict the emails and have only 1 email to notify manager that there is a new member joining?

entry.title: Re: How to implement SAP BTP Audit log service in a CAP Application
entry.content:
Hey @youngzhong,

Thanks for your comment. Regarding your question -

1. Currently, I don't have much idea about mapping the auditLog instance in Kyma. I will check regarding the same and see if I find something good.

2. Audit logs are stored in the AuditLog Viewer service mentioned in the service instance subscription part of the blog with detail, which requires the role of AuditLog auditor, requiring two identifiers - 

  • auditlog-management!b*
  • auditlog-viewer!t*

You can refer to this link for a detailed implementation of the Audit log viewer service -https://help.sap.com/docs/btp/sap-business-technology-platform/audit-log-viewer-for-cloud-foundry-environment

entry.title: Re: Getting error while executing FAGLGVTR
entry.content: SAP only allows maximum two open fiscal years in Asset Accounting at a time, you can use T-code OAAQ to close the assets previous fiscal year and no depreciation is in planned it means all depreciation should be posted

entry.title: Re: 1H 2025 Release Highlights on SuccessFactors Learning Management System
entry.content: Thanks for sharing the details. It is much helpful and very informative.

entry.title: Re: Joule in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition - Setup Guide
entry.content:
Hi Nagesh,

I am thinking about one Integration with Joule, but wondering if this is now feasible.

There is already a set of solution and Fiori applications and purely hosted on BTP Cloud foundry. And now the launchpad and applications want to integrate with Joule.

I think the cloud identity service could handle well with Joule and applications and idP, etc.

How this could be injected or set up in frontend launchpad afterwards?

I saw your tutorials about Joule integrations mostly serves on the standard solution with Joule,

How is it for Joule to integrate with a customized apps and solutions? Is is possible now?

I guess the Joule works as a way as a plug-in, and maybe this scenario needs other coding or break-out?

Please correct me if I am wrong.

Thank you for your support!

Thanks, Roger

How to I replicate this on replication flow and local table in datasphere, How to recognize these new fields in Datasphere?

Thank you !

entry.title: Unable to Create Mobile Application in SAP Build – "Not Subscribed" Message
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I'm currently following the tutorial "Create Your First MDK Application"  Create Your First MDK Application | SAP Tutorials on SAP BTP.
When I try to create a new application in SAP Build  (first step of Start Your MDK Application in the Editor Task, I see that the "Mobile" application type is not selectable and shows a message stating "Not Subscribed."

I'm using a trial subaccount, and I have already created an instance of Mobile Services and generated the service key. However, it seems that the Mobile Application type in SAP Build is not available due to the subscription status.

Could anyone clarify:

  • What exact subscription is required to enable the Mobile application type in SAP Build?

  • Is it available in trial accounts, or only in productive environments?

  • Are there any additional configurations or entitlements needed?

Thanks in advance for your help!
Davide Bruno

entry.title: Re: ACADEMIC LESSONS: Your roadmap to teaching with SAP Learning Hub, student edition in the classro
entry.content:
Dear @Heather_UA 

I just wanted to confirm that I now have access to the SAP Learning Hub – Student Edition.

Thank you very much for your assistance and support throughout the process. I truly appreciate your help in resolving the issue.

Best regards,

entry.title: Re: change of Session timeout settings ? Do you recommend ??
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

Thank you for reaching out. This is Hannah from SuccessFactors Employee Central Team.

Please check the KBA as below: 2088893 - How to define the Session timeout period and timeout warning period for SuccessFactors Platform

As the topic is owned by the Platform team and the Employee Central team has limited knowledge of it, it is recommended to direct any further questions to the Platform team.

 

Best regards,

Hannah

entry.title: Re: Error while trying to activate new SAP key
entry.content:
Hi Steffen,

I am completely doing guesswork here. I used to see similar emtpy error messages in the past and so far I could solve these issues by completely clearing the browser cache and loggin off and on again.

Did you check the logfiles under Monitor >>> Integrations and APIs >>> Access Logs >>> System Log Files maybe you can see something in there.
Update: I had issues with a p12 key pair used for a secure connection to one of our business partners today and I can find error messages for this in our system's log.

Best of luck!

Regards,
Mathias

entry.title: Re: The Evolution of SAP Data & Analytics is Accelerating!
entry.content:
Hi @RaminS !

Thank you for your perspective. I think SAP gave a pretty clear answer about the direction with SAP BDC. We will see how that works in the next months.

I know many customers, having a good reason to stay with SAP BW on prem. But I also think, we will see that less and less now. For many customers looking for the S/4HANA embedded analytics capabilities is an interesting aspect as SAP build in analytics based on HANA and enable SAC for direct access. But it is an embedded and operational approach and needs a clear picture about the individual need. Every data platform, BW, Datasphere, ... is a decision to a more strategic analytics approach, especially if you have multiple sources, beside S/4. Even SAP is pushing S/4 rather as core and is building new, typically cloud-based solutions around. But we can think about data fabric letting the data where it is. SAP Business Data Cloud leverage the One Domain Model to harmonize at least SAP Sources for this reason.

entry.title: Issue in activating Extended CDS View
entry.content:
Hi Team i am traying to extend the standard view NSDM_V_MARC.

My syntax is as below.

@AbapCatalog.sqlViewAppendName: 'YCL_COBL'
@EndUserText.label: 'Extension view for Append MM_APP_MSEG'
extend view NSDM_V_MARC with ZNSDM_V_MARC_EXT
{
zzdanger,
zztop_stock,
zzstabl,
zzplan,
zzrmatn,
zzdmatn,
zzimatn,
zzid_repa,
zzqs,
zznivq,
zzid_imma,
zzcd_gest,
zzdur_moy,
zzpomatnr
}

 

But while activating the same i am getting below error.

Internal exception raised (VIEW DEFINITION AND EXTEND DO NOT FIT TOGETHER )

Your help be really appreciated.

@ABAP @Hana @CDS

entry.title: Re: Email notification for Flexible workflow – Purchase Order
entry.content:
Hi team,

can email notification to be sent to requisitioner when PO is approved in PO flexible workflow

entry.title: Re: Big memory consumption XSLT, why Heap is used? Best with ST.
entry.content: @HermannGahm Your answers help me a lot to better understand memory consumption (e.g. RSMEMORY to show the difference between DIA and BGD memory strategy). I have added two animated GIF of MAXIMUM (if more source data is added, it would dump) memory consumption of XSLT versus ST via SM50, running in DIA processes. In this test, I realize that ST can consume Heap too, but I couldn't see it in my first test because ST consumes so little memory compared to XSLT. I'll check SAT, STATS and Memory Inspector tomorrow. My original question concerns the big difference between XSLT and ST, so I guess that @Ryan-Crosby answer points to the right direction (respectively random access versus serial access, i.e. maybe the source XML is parsed entirely and stored in memory before running XSLT).

entry.title: Re: SAP IQ Storage Allocation Explained and "why is my database full when I have free space&quo

Thanks!

Lets say my source is ECC and target is an ODATA table.

Usually in POSTMAN, a transaction ID is required.

What about BODS, how will the transaction ID be generated?

Best regards, Adam

entry.title: SAC Thresholds, Compare to measure missing
entry.content:
Hi

Within a story I am trying to apply a threshold on a measure to apply conditional formatting depending on its value compared to another.

When creating  a threshold from the ribbon menu I can only create account based thresholds, I believe due to the model containing an account dimension. To get round this I select the measure header in a table and from the context menu (from right clicking) select thresholds here this allows a measure threshold but this does not allows a threshold where the measure is compared to another measure as shown below.

 

I should see this

entry.title: Re: Change created own overhead rate in costing sheet
entry.content:
Hi,

you cannot change the dependency when entering the overhead rate. You must delete the line and re-enter the correct dependency with the overhead rate, as each dependency has specific fields for the overhead rate.

Best regards,

Katerina

entry.title: Process not found Error - Build Process Automation Form
entry.content:
Hallo All

I have the issue below in both my trial account and development systems.

I have created an approval form and am trying to make changes to the notification form.

entry.title: Is it possible to create hierarchy variables in Datasphere/Analytical Model?
entry.content:
Dear all,

 

May I ask you if you have found a possibility to create variables containing hierarchies in SAP Datasphere? 
Users need to be able to select hierarchy nodes in SAC prompts - Otherwise they have to select hundreds of single values.

Thank you
Timo

entry.title: Instructor-led with online content - online content "preview" only
entry.content:
Hello all,

I have an instructor-led with online content item that is not working as expected. 

The expectation is that an employee registers for a class requiring approval, and after the approval they can access the online content. However, the online content section of the item details still only shows "content preview" for employees who are approved and actively enrolled in the class. 

"Unregistered User can Access Online Content" is off 
"Content available only during specified time slot of a class" is off
"Content is available for launch (available for users)" is on 

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Instructor-led with online content - online content "preview" only
entry.content:
Also, at the content object level, "content object is active" is checked, and "content object is online" is checked.

If I duplicate the item as online only, the content is available and launches correctly.

entry.title: Secure 2.0 Section 603 Multiple Savings Plans
entry.content: We have a 401k plan and a 457 plan, and employees are allowed to contribute the maximum to both. The 457 plan has to consider both the EE contribution and the ER contribution when reaching the maximum ($23500) before catch-up can be triggered. All is working correctly currently, but when I ran some test cases for Section 603 requirements, the catch-up contribution for the 457 plan continues until the EE contribution reaches the maximum (not considering the ER contribution as it should). The 401k catch-up stops as expected based on how I have table VV_T5F99K2_US_BN603 configured. I think the issue is that we do not have the 457 plan marked as a Qualified Plan in V_5UBA_C. We are not able to mark both plans as Qualified Plans because our employees are allowed to contribute the maximum to both. If I mark them both as Qualified, the system considers the EE 401k plus the EE 457 when reaching the maximum, and that won't work for us. Does anyone have a recommendation as to how to meet the requirements of Section 603?

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere External Access Overview: APIs, CLI and SQL
entry.content:
Great job! One thing that drove me crazy with the CLI:

datasphere login

assumes you have chrome installed. If not, it will fail and you will not see why.

Use

datasphere login --browser edge

to make it work!

entry.title: FM (or other ways) to read layout input-field content from COOIS tcode
entry.content:
Hi SAP Gurus,

I searched into the forum without any success on this topic.

In my scenario I saved a variant in COOIS  list / Operations, let's say V1, which contains some selection-input filters (MRP personnel, plant, etc). Other than this, I also saved a layout using selection screen input field, let's say L1, containing some filters which will apply on my alv ouput, in specific I filtered only operation 0025 and 0035, so that for all production orders it will display these rows (in some other variants there can be other filters).

I'm able to read filters from variant, but I cannot find how to get layout filters. This is my starting code:

INITIALIZATION.
  p_syst1 = 'TECO'. "status Closed

START-OF-SELECTION.

      CALL FUNCTION 'RS_VARIANT_CONTENTS'
        EXPORTING
          report               = 'PPIO_ENTRY'
          variant              = 'V1' 
        TABLES
          valutab              = lt_rsparams

"Exclude TECO status
      CLEAR: ls_rsparams.
      LOOP AT lt_rsparams INTO ls_rsparams 
                          WHERE selname = 'P_SYST1'.
        lv_tabix = sy-tabix.
        ls_rsparams-sign = 'E'.
        ls_rsparams-option = 'EQ'.
        ls_rsparams-low = p_syst1.
        MODIFY lt_rsparams FROM ls_rsparams INDEX lv_tabix.
      ENDLOOP.

     lt_parameters[] = lt_rsparams[].

"Prepare only Operation List to read
      ls_tcoa-oper_sel   = abap_true.

      CALL FUNCTION 'COIS_SELECT_PARAMETERS_SET'
        EXPORTING
          it_parameter = lt_parameters
          is_tcoa      = ls_tcoa.       

      CALL FUNCTION 'COIS_SELECT_ORDERS_READ'
        CHANGING
          ct_iooper = lt_iooper.


"Here I need to include filters contained in L1 layout
"to further filter IOOPER table otherwise I get all fields 
"without any filter

      MOVE-CORRESPONDING lt_iooper[] TO lt_out1[].

I tried with the followings snippets without any success:

DATA(lo_variant) = cl_salv_bs_variant=>get_instance( ).
DATA(ls_layout)  TYPE salv_s_layout.

TRY.
    lo_variant->set_report( 'PPIO_ENTRY' ).
    lo_variant->set_layout( 'L1' ).
    ls_layout = lo_variant->read_data( ).
    DATA(lt_filters) = ls_layout-filters.
  CATCH cx_salv_bs_sc_runtime_info INTO DATA(e).
    " Errore nella lettura del layout
ENDTRY.

 And this:

DATA: lt_ltdx TYPE TABLE OF ltdx,
      lv_variant TYPE rlgrap-filename.

SELECT * INTO TABLE lt_ltdx
  FROM ltdx
  WHERE report = 'PPIO_ENTRY'
    AND handle = ''
    AND variant = 'L1'.

IF sy-subrc = 0.
  " Deserialize error
  IMPORT layout = ls_layout
         filters = lt_filter
         FROM DATA ls_ltdx-xlayout ID 'LAY'.

  LOOP AT lt_filter INTO ls_filter.
   
  ENDLOOP.

ENDIF.

In this last case I can't deserialize information from LTDX table and also I don't have any XSTRING or RAW data element in its strucutre, in fact lt_filter is EMPTY.

 

Do you have any clue or advise on this?

I'm in S/4.

Requesting your kind help

thanks

entry.title: Re: Step-by-Step Migration: From SAP Web IDE (Neo) to BAS (CF)
entry.content:
Hi @ianzheng ,

Thank you for your comment. I’m glad you found the article helpful!

Regarding your query about ABAP destination creation, I currently do not have a specific guide on this topic. However, you can refer to the SAP documentation, which provides detailed guidance for such configurations. Here's a useful resource you might find relevant: https://help.sap.com/docs/connectivity/sap-btp-connectivity-cf/destination-examples?locale=en-US#loio3a2d57580d474da6960a644462a92861__http_op

If you have any further questions or need assistance, feel free to reach out.

Best regards,
Santhosh

entry.title: SAP C4C - Badi for Incoming Address Deletion Request
entry.content:
Hi All,

since we have the problem, that Business Partner Adresses cannot be deleted as long as they are used by Contacts I was wondering whether I can reassign another valid address to Contact in order to make the address deletable.

As the data comes in from SAP ERP via CPI, there is no use of a manual process. The SAP ERP is the data source for Business Partners and their adresses. Contacts on the other hand are creatred in C4C and are not replicated to SAP ERP. But they inherit their address from the Business Partner Object.

This leads to error messages like "You are not allowed to delete this address." when a Business Partner gets updated and a address is deleted.

So the idea is to fix this by reassigning the Business Partners new main address to the Contact so deletion is possible. The only point I am missing is: Where can I hook in in the replication process to witness the address deletion before its magic is done.

I already have implemented enhancements in SAP C4C like RecipientSystemDeterminationbyBuinessObject to avoid unwelcomed replication. So I am searching for a similar process to "correct" the address in there.

Kind regards,
Manu

entry.title: Re: SAP Landscape Management Cloud discontinued
entry.content:
@Marco_Dorn How will the stop/start automation be provided (which LAMA is doing perfectly for us on premise) in the cloud, if at all we decide to move to cloud? Do Azure or AWS have a similar feature?

If we decide to stick on premise beyond 2027, can we still use our LAMA for automation till we move to cloud?

entry.title: Re: Iflow HTTP Oauth authentication unsupported grant typ...
Re: #SITCPS2025 O Fim da TAXBRA/RVABRA e a Chegada do TaaS: Tudo o Que Você Precisa Saber
entry.content: Dezen é fera!

entry.title: Re: Secure 2.0 Section 603 Multiple Savings Plans
entry.content:
Hi @Debbie_Moses ,

You're absolutely on point, the core of the issue lies in how the system treats the 457 plan contributions under Section 603. Here's what you can consider:

Marking both the 401(k) and 457 as "Qualified Plans" in V_5UBA_C causes the system to sum EE contributions across both plans which isn't what you want.

What’s happening:

  • 401(k) catch-up is working fine because VV_T5F99K2_US_BN603 is correctly configured.

  • 457 plan is incorrectly triggering catch-up based only on EE contributions, ignoring ER contributions, since it’s not marked as a Qualified Plan  and that flag is what controls the inclusion of ER in the catch-up calculation.

Recommended workaround:

  • Don't mark both plans as Qualified in V_5UBA_C.

  • Instead, create a custom rule or enhancement in the Benefits BAdI (e.g. BADI_FBN_CONTRIBUTION_LIMIT) that handles the 457 plan catch-up separately and Manually includes both EE + ER contributions when applying the $23,500 limit before catch-up.

This lets you: ✔ Keep 401(k) logic intact.
✔ Avoid the system summing contributions incorrectly.
✔ Enforce ER+EE cap for the 457 plan as required.

for SAP Help Reference: Configure Contribution Limits
(Search for Section 603 and catch-up contributions for relevant info)

if this answered your question, please mark the response accordingly. Thank you

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Finance, SAP S/4HANA...
entry.content:
The difference in reporting is that project costs are internally calculated for Customer Projects, but for Enterprise Projects they are uploaded with values only, not quantities.

You will have to develop a custom report to report on quantities on Enterprise Projects.  Enterprise Project cost planning is uploaded (quantities are not available to upload, only values).  You could get plan quantities from Project Demands and then layer in the actual quantities.

entry.title: Re: Iflow HTTP Oauth authentication unsupported grant typ...
entry.content:
Hi,

Maybe you can type a star on fields Scope, Resource and Audience.

Kind regards

entry.title: Re: Mass creation of Project and WBS element using odata
entry.content:

entry.title: Unable to find field in OData Service Explorer
entry.content: So I've created a custom OData Service for Service Requests and I'm having a hard time finding the 'Category' field. I've tried adding every option I can think of to the service and have been using postman to send payloads with every field filled in but none of them relate to the 'Category' field. I've noticed that the fields in the custom service sometimes differ from the standard service as well so I can't just copy the payload for the standard service that works and use it in the custom service. I'm in the middle of reading a bunch of documentation to see if I can find any answers but does any one have any advice for finding the 'Category' field in the OData Service Explorer so that I can use it in the custom service? TIA.

entry.title: Re: Changing my universal ID from S USER to P USER
entry.content:
@Joerom For Universal ID support, please reach out to our Customer Interaction Center, they can help you: https://support.sap.com/en/contact-us.html?anchorId=section_42886245

They will, however, not be able to help you retrieve your certifications. (I believe)
I therefore recommend you contact SAP Learning support after you have changed your Universal ID: https://learning.sap.com/helpcenter

The following is the details of my US account.

It is giving the response, couldn't subscribe to SAP Build Process Automation. Try again. If the problem persists, please post a question to SAP Community.

entry.title: Re: The Transition from SAP GTS 11 to SAP GTS, edition for SAP HANA
entry.content: Can I get the list of FIORI apps available for GTS E4H (SAP HANA 2023) ? In the reference library all the FIORI apps related to GTS are not updated.

entry.title: SAP TM Enhancement Report to check TOR data
entry.content:
SAP TM Enhancement Report to check TOR data

SAP Transportation Management (TM) delivery some standards report to review TM Objects also the BOBF -Business Object Processing Framework, transactions in SAP to check and execute different action within TM objects, i.e one of the previous blog: SAP TM BOPF Navigator -Transaction /SCMTMS/BONAV - SAP Community

The report /SCMTMS/TOR_MODEL_DESCR is available in SAP TM to check the TOR data along with some BOBF Nodes in the structure like Item Level, head Level, Stops, BPs, etc.

This report is flexible to execute by User, Range of dates, Document Category, Document Type also with Document Number and Internal Key TM objects.

 

Also, some Technical settings and possible to save as variants:

Once you execute the report you can see the TM Nodes on left side and right side each line related with the TM Documents:

 

For example, like see the BP at FU Level:

This report gives a quickly overview of the TM Nodes and easy navigate through.

Refer to:

3586175 - Enhancement for report /SCMTMS/TOR_MODEL_DESCR - SAP for Me

3559480 Enhancements for TOR Check Report
3559026 Enhancement of report to display TOR data
3557888 Abort of Report /SCMTMS/TOR_MODEL_DESCR
3480188 Main Cargo Item flag is set incorrectly
3476950 Self Check Extension
3408472 TOR Self Check Extension
3351482 Extension of report /SCMTMS/TOR_MODEL_DESCR
3342545 Extension of report /SCMTMS/TOR_MODEL_DESCR
3322934 Extend TOR Check Report with Change Document Info
3071406 Wrong data shown within debugger script /SCMTMS/DS_TOR_MODEL_DESCR
3057939 Extension of debugger script /SCMTMS/DS_TOR_MODEL_DESCR
3053162 Missing debugger script to display current TOR data in a readable format

Hope this help you!

Thank you and regards.

Rogerio Lima.

entry.title: Re: Instructor-led with online content - online content "...
entry.content:
Found the issue! 

Both the item and the class had the approval process on it. Once I removed the approval process from the overall item, it worked as expected.

entry.title: Re: TVARVC variables not showing in the variant selection
entry.content:
Honestly I have the same problem, but the "solutions" presented above did not solve my problem!

I have neither the issue, that Tcode STVARVC created the variables "T" of TVARVC table in the Dev -Config client 000, my variables are not created in client 000 instead, they are in the right client, on which we work!

Also this link http://help.sap.com/saphelp_nw70/helpdata/en/c0/980386e58611d194cc00a0c94260a5/frameset.htm did  not help further, as I know how to create variables!

The problem is not solved for me. Unfortunately no one writes the final solutions, once the problems are solved. no one is open to share his insight, as long his problem is solved.

Has someone a solution for this?

entry.title: "no trainer on server checked in" Error with context.html file
entry.content:
I am trying to get my context.html file to function properly, but I keep getting the same error all the time:

{"details":"C6BF0D18-04231701","message":"no trainer on server checked in","message_error_code":"UE_TRAINER_NOT_FOUND","status":400}

All Resources have been saved, published and sync'd and the same trainer version is set as default in both Manager and Producer. 

Any suggestions on how to correct this?

entry.title: which transaction we can download mutiple parts' two weeks demand?
entry.content:
I am using MD04 to track a single parts schlne.

Is there any function/transcation can show two weeks demand for all of my part in one report?

entry.title: Re: choosing rows/columns from data source to show in Dat...
entry.content: Hey William, thanks for your response. Let me see if I understand this correctly. If I have this dummy table pulling data in the story from the backend source even though it's hidden, will it not impact the page performance. Let me know if I missing a point here. Could you please expand on this?

entry.title: Re: SAP BW/4HANA 2023 Now Supports SAP HANA Cloud, Data Lake Relational Engine
entry.content:
Hi @RobertWaywell !

Great news to see this. If I see right the BW/4HANA has to be in the cloud for this scenario?

I wonder how this is connected to the SAP Business Data Cloud scenario. On the one hand, in SAP BDC I have the possibility to bring BW-data to SAP Data Lake, Files in the form of a data product. On the other hand I would love to understand if this possibility is available in SAP BDC, too? I would expect so. So thinking one step further - is a combined scenario possible somehow? Using all the layers in the scenario e. g. like shown before here: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/data-management-concepts-and-techniques-in-sap-hana-cloud/ba-p/13523597 ?

entry.title: Re: Firebase Authentication Error in SAP Build Apps
entry.content: Good morning, today we got the same error again. can you check?

entry.title: Re: Sales Pricing Condition Discount applied only on a sp...
entry.content: Thanks, a version of approach 3 seems to be working fine for now.

entry.title: Re: S/4HANA 2022 FPS1 Fully-Activated Appliance standard installation
entry.content: HANA daemon is not starting after after rename

entry.title: Re: Custom fields not edited in Purchase Requisition API
entry.content: Just in case this is useful for someone, I did find the reason behind of why custom fields weren't updated. Basically, the badi triggered when a purchase requisition is created or modified has a custom logic to fill these custom fields, so when I tried to modified them from an API, my new data was being replaced for the original mapping of the badi.

entry.title: Electronic Bank Reconciliation Mismatch error
entry.content:
i receive lot of collection with Rs 108000 but at the time of electronic bank reconciliation wrong entry are getting cleared.

what possible solution is there to meet this type of errors.

entry.title: Clicks not recording dictionary text
entry.content: When recording in either Instant Producer or Producer, the "click" bubbles are not populating anything. Input text during recording works as it should. Manually creating the "Interaction > Mouse click" populates the dictionary text and we must manually go in to the object name/image to edit the file. What is the fix for this?

entry.title: Re: Separate authorization for park and post supplier inv...
entry.content:
Hello, 

There is special application that allows you to park supplier invoice. Please find documntation below:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/0e602d466b99490187fcbb30d1dc897c/2527430934784953a5659106578ca695.html?locale=en-US

Park should also be possible from Create Supplier Invoice app:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/0e602d466b99490187fcbb30d1dc897c/01060a2e758f4e8a9d4a7cf07b0ce323.html?locale=en-US

Reagrds, 

Jagoda Drwiega

entry.title: Re: Asset Accounting (FI-AA) – Insurance values in SAP S/4HANA
entry.content: A very comprehensive explanation.  Thank you for sharing your knowledge with the SAP Community.

entry.title: Maintain Determination of Value-Added Tax Registration Number
entry.content:
Dear Team,

When creating a sales order, my client wants that the taxe applicated should be the one of the sold-to party and not the ship to party if they are different. 

I updated the activity "Maintain Determination of Value-Added Tax Registration Number" by adding the letter A for the sales organization. I also read the sap note 872449.

I did my test with an italian customer which has a french ship to party. The tax applicated is the one of the french partner and not the italian despite the update of the activity. 

How can I make the tax determination be the one of the sold to party ? 

Regards.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Maintain Determination of Value-Added Tax Registratio...
entry.content:
Hello Customer,

As stated in our Public Cloud KBA 0003275376 - TTX1 for export is not determined - S/4HANA Cloud (pretty similar to the note you read from on premise): SAP system will always first check the destination country and then searches for a VAT registration number in this destination country. If there are others VAT registration numbers maintained in the customer master for different countries, system will checked if the tax destination country does not equal the partner country.

So, By default, SAP uses the Ship-To Party’s tax classification in this rule. You might check it here: Session > VAT ID Determination (Customer) > 3308072 - Output tax determination in sales billing - SAP S/4HANA Cloud

I would also might advise to check whether there is a BAdI sd_tax_determination released, if yes, you can write a code to override the logic, for example:

IF is_partner-partner_function = 'AG'. " AG = Sold-To
  es_tax_data-country = is_partner-country.
  es_tax_data-region = is_partner-region.
  ...
ENDIF.

entry.title: Re: SAP BW/4HANA 2023 Now Supports SAP HANA Cloud, Data Lake Relational Engine
entry.content:
@pbaumann 

At this time the support is for an on premise BW/4HANA system to use HDLRE in place of on premise SAP IQ for the DTO storage. The RISE/PCE team is looking to certify this architecture for BW/4HANA systems deployed in RISE as well, but that is still work in progress. 

SAP BW/4HANA Data Tiering Optimization ("DTO") serves a different purpose from data product that is produced from a BW system. DTO is focused on tiering data out of the HANA storage, while keeping the full data set available to be queried through BW. This allows the BW system to keep historic data while reducing TCO compared to keeping all data in HANA. Data products are focused on sharing data with other applications using a well defined format.

entry.title: Re: Customizing Automatic Notification Creation in T350 f...
entry.content: Hi Mike,

entry.title: Re: S4H PUBLIC EVO and EFB parameter IDs
entry.content:
Hello, 

I haven't found anything directly connected to parameters EVO nor EFB, but there is possibility to create default values for user that will apper in PR. See SAP Note 3062458 about it:

https://me.sap.com/notes/3062458/E

Here you will find SAP Note 2613250 about authorisation check:

https://me.sap.com/notes/2613250/E

Its not directly the same, but I hope it will help you to solve your issue.

Best reagrds, 

Jagoda Drwiega

entry.title: I need to copy functionality to the ASR cockpit
entry.content:
Hi, 

In the ASR (Advanced shipping and receiving) cockpit I want to add a button for wave picking. A similar button already exists in the send cockpit. Now, I've been able (with help from colleagues) to add the physical button, but I can't seem to manage to add the functionality from that other button. 
Here's the existing button:

Here's the new button that should react like the button above:

here's the technical details of the new button:

I have added 'COPY' to the button for testing purposes. When I press the + sign I see a list of commands that can be added to the button:

But how can I add this functionality from the button to be copied?

I've read about I might need to implement the feeder class? I think that might be this one:

Does any guru here can tell me if I'm on the right way and know where to go from here?

Many thanks & regards,

Ron.

entry.title: SAP ALM Deep dive workshop - Atlanta, GA
entry.content:
An in-person SAP Cloud ALM Deep Dive Workshop will be held at the SAP office in Atlanta, GA. This full-day workshop is designed for SAP customers and partners interested in strengthening their knowledge and capabilities in SAP Cloud ALM for both implementation and operations.

The agenda includes expert-led sessions, hands-on exercises, and peer networking opportunities—all focused on helping attendees maximize the value of SAP Cloud ALM in their business transformation journey.

Why Attend?

  • Explore the latest features and innovations in SAP Cloud ALM.
  • Participate in hands-on sessions for both implementation and operations scenarios.
  • Gain practical insights into managing cloud and hybrid landscapes using SAP Cloud ALM.
  • Learn how to align your ALM strategy with business goals to support agility and growth.
  • Interact with SAP ALM experts and connect with peers across industries.
  • Complete the onsite assessment to earn the Solution Transformation Consultant Badge, validating your expertise in end-to-end lifecycle management.

    Additional Information

    Attendees are encouraged to bring their own laptops for hands-on exercises and for taking the badge assessment. A dedicated network will be available for use during the sessions.

    Registration : https://go4.events.sap.com/sap-alm-events-na/en_us/home.html

    Participation is free, but subject to approval due to limited seating.

entry.title: Re: get line number at run time
entry.content: It can be useful when refactoring code which populates an internal table at many different locations within a huge procedure with many loops and  conditions and we look at that populated internal table and wonder where exactly the rows have been added without having to use the debugger much.

    Participation is free, but subject to approval due to limited seating.

entry.title: Cascading budget report for the spend on the entire population.
entry.content:
Hello,

Is there a way to get a spend report or any reports for Cascading Budgets. Except for the "export" that shows who receives a budget or the rollup, am not seeing anything. It does not work in Executive Review if the employee is not the planner and the Comp Team needs to have an overll view of spend and by planner.

Thanks,

pbrandi

entry.title: Re: Customizing Automatic Notification Creation in T350 f...
entry.content: Have you enabled 'Define Notification and Order Integration' Configuration?

entry.title: Re: S4/HANA Business Objects for modules
entry.content:
Hello, 

Check SAP Process Navigator:

https://me.sap.com/processnavigator/globalSearch?sIsFrom=BusinessProcess&sId=&name=&sSSId=

You will find here business processes that are available in SAP. You will also find here Best Practises for SAP processes.

Hope it will help.

Jagoda Drwiega

entry.title: How to extract MBC Bank Statement file data from SAP S4 HANA Public cloud
entry.content:
Hi Team,

How can we extract the Bank statements received into SAP S4 HANA Public cloud system from Bank via MBC connectivity . and send the same bank statements in CAMT.053 format to another external system?

 

Is this possible on especially on SAP S4 HANA public cloud system?

Please share the related blogs or articles.

SAP Multi-Bank Connectivity SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition connector for SAP Multi-Bank Connectivity

entry.title: Re: EWM Outbound delivery - how to update a custom status...
entry.content:
@Ajit_RoutrayThanks so much for a response! Unfortunately, that method only allows to set few specific statuses.

Documentation for the method says:

"You can set the following status for an outbound delivery:

Status Type Transit Status (DOY): Values In Yard (-) and Out of Yard (X)"

Just in case that was incorrect, I did try to use it with Z... status and found that it ends in a method that checks an internal table with specific statuses and an exception is raised if the status passed is not found there. Just in case someone else runs into this, here is a screenshot from debugger showing the specific allowed statuses and the code location.

entry.title: Re: SAP API Management - How to create a Cloud Integration Flow API Provider
entry.content: Insightful!! especially around authentication challenges which are critical and often tricky part of integrations. Thank you for sharing.

entry.title: Re: XML for Adobe Master template
entry.content: 6 years later after the question, is anyone know if SAP has did any progress on that subject? Now that SAP public cloud is more and more present, the #&&DOWNLOAD_FORM_DATA_XML&&# still have not evolved. Is anyone has an idea if SAP will do something to provide more supports?

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to create hierarchy variables in Datas...
entry.content:
Hey,

You can do it by example by defining hierarchy in the dimension first:

Using dimension in the Analytical Model will give You option to render data in hierarchy + filter based on that.

 

Usefully links:

https://developers.sap.com/group.data-warehouse-cloud-hierarchies.html

https://www.reyemsaibot.com/2024/02/28/sap-datasphere-hierarchies-like-in-sap-bw/

entry.title: Multi-Language Backend Messages in BTP MDK
entry.content:
We have created an Android MDK with multiple languages.  The application is working perfectly with the different languages based on the devices set language.

Device Language setting:

MDK Application Menu:

When logging into SAP via the Logon Pad, my language is set in the Logon Options and then when logging into SAP via GUI, my language is set properly.

SAP transaction text is all French:

When the Online and Offline services are initialized I am not seeing the accept-language in the HTTP headers and my SY-LANGU is set to E.

How can I get properly translated data without the logon language being correct during the initialization of my Offline datastore?

I am seeing the accept-language header parameter when I perform a Function Import call, but my SY-LANGU is still set to E, so I am not getting my error messages back in the proper language.

I would not expect to have to translate the backend messages being returned, I expect the messages to be in the language that the device and MDK application are using.

I am hoping someone can let me know how to get the SY-LANGU set from the MDK language.

entry.title: Re: How do I update the replication flow to update local table in Datasphere ?
entry.content: Do you have some trouble with that? You should be able to updated local table structure + replication flow. Let us know if You have an error or issue with that.

entry.title: how to extract End of life information with SID and extended maintenance details in solution manager
entry.content:
How to extract end of life and extended maintenance information along with SID and Product information from Solman


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: how to extract End of life information with SID and e...
entry.content:
To generate a report with End of Maintenance information for the installed product and system SID on Solution Manager, follow these steps:

  1. Open the LMDB
  2. Under Related Links, click on Landscape Reporting
  3. Select relevant report: "Technical Systems - Installed Product Versions"
  4. Once report is displayed, you can Export to save the report to a local Microsoft Excel spreadsheet

Related documentation:
* KBA 2587065 - How to generate system landscape information from the LMDB - SAP Solution Manager
* https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_Solution_Manager/c413647f87a54db59d18cb074ce3dafd/211d7c510ef0dd0de10000000a441470.html

Regards,
Debora

entry.title: [Partner Edition] SAP ALM Deep Dive Workshop - Chicago, IL
entry.content:
Why Should Partners Attend?

This full-day event is meticulously designed to offer you valuable insights and practical experience in managing operations and implementations using SAP Cloud ALM. Through interactive sessions and activities, you'll gain a comprehensive understanding of how to leverage SAP Cloud ALM to drive business transformation and enhance operational efficiency. Secure your spot today and get ready to transform your RISE and GROW journey with SAP Cloud ALM!

Event Highlights:

  1. Develop a Robust ALM Strategy: Discover the importance of a solid Application Lifecycle Management strategy in driving your clients' business growth and enhancing agility.
  2. Master SAP Cloud ALM: Acquire in-depth knowledge of SAP Cloud ALM's functionalities and its pivotal role in managing intelligent cloud and hybrid business landscapes.
  3. Enhance Implementation Skills: Participate in hands-on sessions focused on bolstering your implementation and operational expertise. These practical exercises are designed to empower you to deliver superior outcomes and maximum value for your clients.
  4. Interactive Networking: Engage with SAP ALM experts during interactive sessions. This event provides an excellent opportunity to network with fellow partners and industry peers, facilitating a dynamic exchange of insights, experiences, and strategic approaches.
  5. Guidance for Transition to SAP Cloud ALM: Uncover effective strategies to assist your customers in smoothly transitioning to SAP Cloud ALM, ensuring they leverage its full capabilities.
  6. Achieve Accreditation: Elevate your expertise by earning the Solution Transformation Consultant Badge to showcase your proficiency in managing the design to deploy phase of business transformations, utilizing an integrated and comprehensive toolchain approach.

Who should attend this workshop:

  • Project delivery Leads, Consultants, Project Managers, ALM Experts, Test Managers, GROW & RISE Sales, and Presales advisors

Please Note:

We encourage all attendees to bring their own laptops to the workshop. This will allow you to fully participate in the hands-on sessions and engage with the interactive activities designed to enhance your understanding of SAP Cloud ALM. To ensure a smooth and effective learning experience, a dedicated network will be provided for your convenience. This network will support your participation in both the practical exercises and the Solution Transformation Consultant Badge test.

Participation is free at this limited seat event : REGISTER NOW

For any further queries please contact us on sapalmus@sap.com

Regards,

ALM Go-To-Market Americas

entry.title: Re: EWM Outbound delivery - how to update a custom status value?
entry.content: Additionally, I've also looked at the interface /SCDL/IF_AF_STATUS_MANAGEMENT because the name sounded promising. There is no documentation for it in SE24 but it is used in a report /SCWM/POST_PROC_DLV_SET_DOY, so I looked there for an example. The problem with this option is that it has "Activity" as a mandatory parameter and it is not relevant (or even available) in my case.

entry.title: Re: Universal Parallel Accounting - limitations and opportunities
entry.content: Thanks for sharing this summary on UPA.

entry.title: Re: How to Set up email notification to be sent to requisitioner when PO is approved in PO workflow
entry.content: Hi Mohammed945, It may depent of your S4HANA version, in OnPremise in transaction SWDD_SCENARIO, has your workflow any entry in Outcomes

entry.title: Work Items in Customer Projects and Line Items in General Ledger
entry.content:
Hi experts, 

We are using Work Items within Work Packages in Customer Projects to segregate the team's work across different work packages. 

We would like to see this information reflected in the General Ledger. In the app "Display Line Items in General Ledger", there is a column option for Work Item ID, but this information does not appear in the GL line items. 

Could you please clarify if the Work Item ID from Customer Projects should be reflected in the GL? Or is this field related to another functionality?

If it should be populated from Customer Projects, could you please guide me on how to configure the system so that this information appears in the GL line items? 

Thank you very much!
